title: Funding carry
summary: Targets persistent perp funding and basis dislocations while filtering for crowding, liquidity, and execution drift.

supportedVenues.notes: Drift is the only perp venue with bounded live-proof evidence through Trader Ralph today, but this strategy remains blocked at draft until the perp feature substrate lands.

assetConstraints.notes: Initial draft is intentionally scoped to the SOL underlying on Drift.
Collateral and risk budgeting stay USD-denominated for the first perp funding pilot.

featureRequirements.notes: Required to estimate whether expected carry is still favorable at entry time.
Required to compare perp dislocation against a spot reference.
Required to reject crowded carry states and crowded squeezes.

parameterSpecs.label: Max notional USD
parameterSpecs.notes: Upper bound for any single carry deployment.

parameterSpecs.label: Max slippage bps
parameterSpecs.notes: Execution slippage ceiling for carry entries and exits.

parameterSpecs.label: Min funding edge bps
parameterSpecs.notes: Minimum modeled funding edge required before opening exposure.

promotionPolicy.notes: Draft only. Do not promote past draft until perp feature generation, backtests, and Drift paper scorecards are real.
